entries.name: Enochian Scrying
entries.definition: The art of receiving visions and communications from Enochian angels through crystal or mirror gazing.

entries.name: Aethyr Exploration
entries.definition: The practice of exploring and understanding the 30 Aethyric realms of Enochian cosmology.

entries.name: Qabalistic Pathworking
entries.definition: The systematic exploration of the Tree of Life paths for spiritual development.

entries.name: Angelic Evocation
entries.definition: The practice of calling and communicating with angelic beings through ritual means.

entries.name: Elemental Magic
entries.definition: Working with the four elements and their corresponding forces and beings.

entries.name: True Will Discovery
entries.definition: Techniques for uncovering and aligning with one's divine purpose.

entries.name: Nature Communion
entries.definition: Direct spiritual connection with natural forces and beings.

entries.name: Sacred Geometry Application
entries.definition: The practical application of geometric principles in spiritual work.

entries.name: Quantum Consciousness Work
entries.definition: Applying quantum principles to consciousness exploration and reality manipulation.

entries.name: Egyptian Temple Magic
entries.definition: Ancient Egyptian practices of divine invocation and temple ceremony.

entries.name: Hermetic Alchemy
entries.definition: The spiritual art of transformation through hermetic principles.

entries.name: Angelic Language
entries.definition: The study and use of Enochian language for divine communication.
